entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Grains, broadly defined to include sorghum, used for managing various health conditions

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A specific grain included in the broad definition of millets

entities.name: DIABETES
entities.description: A metabolic disease that millets are advocated to help manage and prevent

entities.name: HYPERLIPIDEMIA
entities.description: A condition characterized by high lipid levels in the blood

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW AND META-ANALYSIS
entities.description: The research methodology used to collate and analyze evidence on the impacts of millet consumption

entities.name: LIPID PROFILE
entities.description: The collective measurement of various cholesterol and triglyceride levels in the blood

entities.name: TOTAL CHOLESTEROL
entities.description: A component of the lipid profile that is reduced by millet consumption

entities.name: TRIACYLGLYCEROL
entities.description: A component of the lipid profile that is reduced by millet consumption

entities.name: HIGH-DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL
entities.description: Known as good cholesterol, a component of the lipid profile that is increased by millet consumption

entities.name: LOW-DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL
entities.description: A component of the lipid profile that is reduced by millet consumption

entities.name: VERY-LOW–DENSITY LIPOPROTEIN CHOLESTEROL
entities.description: A component of the lipid profile that is reduced by millet consumption

entities.name: SYSTOLIC BLOOD PRESSURE
entities.description: The pressure in arteries during heart contraction, reduced by millet-based meals

entities.name: DIASTOLIC BLOOD PRESSURE
entities.description: The pressure in arteries when the heart rests, reduced by millet-based meals

entities.name: BODY MASS INDEX
entities.description: A measure of body fat based on height and weight, reduced by millet-based meals

entities.name: HYPERTENSION
entities.description: High blood pressure, which is reduced by the consumption of millets

entities.name: ATHEROSCLEROTIC CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by plaque buildup in arteries, the risk of which is reduced by millet consumption

entities.name: OBESITY
entities.description: A condition of excessive body fat mentioned as a target for management via millet consumption

relationships.description: used to analyze impacts of millets on
